info.title: Sim API — Execution & Usage
info.description: Run workflows, poll and cancel executions, resume Human-in-the-Loop pauses, and check usage limits.

tags.name: Execution
tags.description: Run workflows, poll execution status, and cancel runs

tags.name: Human in the Loop
tags.description: Manage paused workflow executions and resume them with input

tags.name: Usage
tags.description: Check rate limits and billing usage

post.description: Execute a deployed workflow. Supports synchronous, asynchronous, and streaming modes. For async execution, the response includes a statusUrl you can poll for results.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deployed workflow to execute.

requestBody.description: Execution configuration including input values and execution mode options.

input.description: Key-value pairs matching the workflow's defined input fields. Use the Get Workflow endpoint to discover available input fields.

triggerType.description: How this execution was triggered. Defaults to api when called via the REST API. Recorded in execution logs for filtering.

stream.description: When true, returns results as Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time block-by-block output streaming.

selectedOutputs.description: List of specific block IDs whose outputs to include in the response. When omitted, all block outputs are returned.

input.query: What is the weather in Tokyo?

output.content: The weather in Tokyo is sunny, 22°C.

202.description: Asynchronous execution has been queued. Poll the statusUrl for results.

get.description: Get the current status of a workflow execution. Returns the run's lifecycle state (`running`, `paused`, `completed`, `failed`, etc.), timing, error, and optionally per-block outputs. Designed for polling — works for any execution, including ones that pause and resume.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the execution.

parameters.name: includeOutput
parameters.description: When `true` and the execution has `status: completed`, include the workflow's final output in the response.

parameters.name: selectedOutputs
parameters.description: Comma-separated block-output selectors. A bare `blockId` returns that block's full output; a dot-path like `blockId.field` or `blockId.nested.path` returns just that value. Results are returned in the `blockOutputs` map keyed by the selector string.

value.error: Wait 1: Wait time exceeds maximum of 5 minutes; enable async mode to wait up to 30 days

post.description: Cancel a running workflow execution. Only effective for executions that are still in progress.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the execution to cancel.

executionId.description: The ID of the cancelled execution.

get.description: Poll the status of an asynchronous workflow execution. Use the jobId returned from the Execute Workflow endpoint when the execution is queued asynchronously.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The job identifier returned in the async execution response.

200.description: Current status of the job. When completed, includes the execution output.

get.description: List all paused executions for a workflow. Workflows pause at Human in the Loop blocks and wait for input before continuing. Use this endpoint to discover which executions need attention.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter paused executions by status.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific paused execution, including its pause points, execution snapshot, and resume queue. Use this to inspect the state before resuming.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The execution ID of the paused execution.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific paused execution using the resume URL path. Returns the same data as the workflow paused execution detail endpoint.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The execution ID of the paused execution.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific pause context within a paused execution. Returns the pause point details, resume queue state, and any active resume entry.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The execution ID of the paused execution.

parameters.name: contextId
parameters.description: The pause context ID to retrieve details for.

post.description: Resume a paused workflow execution by providing input for a specific pause context. The execution continues from where it paused, using the provided input. Supports synchronous, asynchronous, and streaming modes (determined by the original execution's configuration).

x-codeSamples.label: cURL

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

parameters.name: executionId
parameters.description: The execution ID of the paused execution.

parameters.name: contextId
parameters.description: The pause context ID to resume. Found in the pause point's contextId field or resumeLinks.

requestBody.description: Input data for the resumed execution. The structure depends on the workflow's Human in the Loop block configuration.

input.description: Key-value pairs to pass as input to the resumed execution. If omitted, the entire request body is used as input.

200.description: Resume execution completed synchronously, or resume was queued behind another in-progress resume.

oneOf.description: Resume has been queued behind another in-progress resume.

executionId.description: The execution ID assigned to this resume.

oneOf.description: Resume execution started (non-API-key callers). The execution runs asynchronously.

status.description: Indicates the resume execution has started.

executionId.description: The execution ID for the resumed workflow.

value.message: Resume queued. It will run after current resumes finish.

202.description: Resume execution has been queued for asynchronous processing. Poll the statusUrl for results.

503.description: Failed to queue the resume execution. Retry the request.

get.description: Retrieve your current rate limits, usage spending, and storage consumption for the billing period.

200.description: Current rate limits, usage, and storage information.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your Sim API key (personal or workspace). Generate one from the Sim dashboard under Settings > API Keys.

TableId.name: tableId
TableId.description: The unique identifier of the table.

RowId.name: rowId
RowId.description: The unique identifier of the row.

WorkspaceId.name: workspaceId
WorkspaceId.description: The unique identifier of the workspace.

ColumnDefinition.description: Definition of a table column including its type and constraints.

name.description: Column name. Must start with a letter or underscore.

required.description: Whether the column requires a value on insert.

unique.description: Whether values in this column must be unique across all rows.

Table.description: A user-defined table with a typed schema.

columns.description: Array of column definitions for the table.

rowCount.description: Current number of rows in the table.

maxRows.description: Maximum rows allowed by the current billing plan.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the table was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the table was last modified.

TableRow.description: A single row in a table.

data.description: Row data as key-value pairs matching the table schema.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the row was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the row was last modified.

WorkflowSummary.description: Summary representation of a workflow returned in list operations.

description.description: Optional description of what the workflow does.
description.example: Routes incoming support tickets and drafts responses

folderId.description: The folder this workflow belongs to. null if at the workspace root.

workspaceId.description: The workspace this workflow belongs to.

isDeployed.description: Whether the workflow is currently deployed and available for API execution.

deployedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent deployment. null if never deployed.

runCount.description: Total number of times this workflow has been executed.

lastRunAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent execution. null if never run.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was last modified.

WorkflowDetail.description: Full workflow representation including input field definitions and configuration.

description.description: Optional description of what the workflow does.
description.example: Routes incoming support tickets and drafts responses

folderId.description: The folder this workflow belongs to. null if at the workspace root.

workspaceId.description: The workspace this workflow belongs to.

isDeployed.description: Whether the workflow is currently deployed and available for API execution.

deployedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent deployment. null if never deployed.

runCount.description: Total number of times this workflow has been executed.

lastRunAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent execution. null if never run.

variables.description: Workflow-level variables and their current values.

inputs.description: The workflow's input field definitions. Use these to construct the input object when executing the workflow.

fields.description: Map of field names to their type definitions and configuration.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was last modified.

WorkflowDeployment.description: Deployment state of a workflow after a deploy, undeploy, or rollback operation.

isDeployed.description: Whether the workflow is deployed and available for API execution after the operation.

deployedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the active deployment. null after an undeploy.

version.description: The deployment version that is now active. Omitted for undeploy.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings. Present when trigger, schedule, or MCP side-effect sync is still in progress or needs a redeploy.

ExecutionResult.description: Result of a synchronous workflow execution.

success.description: Whether the workflow executed successfully without errors.

executionId.description: Unique identifier for this execution. Use this to query logs or cancel the execution.

output.description: Workflow output keyed by block name and output field. Structure depends on the workflow's block configuration.

error.description: Error message if the execution failed. null on success.

AsyncExecutionResult.description: Response returned when a workflow execution is queued for asynchronous processing.

success.description: Whether the execution was successfully queued.

async.description: Always true for async executions. Use this to distinguish from synchronous responses.

jobId.description: Internal job queue identifier for tracking the execution.

executionId.description: Unique execution identifier. Use this to query execution status or cancel.

statusUrl.description: URL to poll for execution status and results. Returns the full execution result once complete.

LogEntry.description: Summary of a single workflow execution log entry.

executionId.description: Unique execution identifier for this run.

level.description: Log severity. info for successful executions, error for failures.

trigger.description: How the execution was triggered (e.g., api, manual, webhook, schedule, chat).

total.description: Total cost of this execution in USD.

files.description: File outputs produced during execution. null if no files were generated.

LogDetail.description: Detailed log entry with full execution data, workflow metadata, and cost breakdown.

executionId.description: Unique execution identifier for this run.

level.description: Log severity. info for successful executions, error for failures.

trigger.description: How the execution was triggered (e.g., api, manual, webhook, schedule, chat).

workflow.description: Summary metadata about the workflow at the time of execution.

name.description: Workflow name at the time of execution.

description.description: Workflow description at the time of execution.
description.example: Routes incoming support tickets and drafts responses

executionData.description: Detailed execution data including block-level traces and final output.

traceSpans.description: Block-level execution traces with timing, inputs, and outputs for each block that ran.

finalOutput.description: The workflow's final output after all blocks completed.

cost.description: Detailed cost breakdown for this execution.

total.description: Total cost of this execution in USD.

tokens.description: Aggregate token usage across all AI model calls in this execution.

models.description: Per-model cost and token breakdown. Keys are model identifiers (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-20250514).

additionalProperties.description: Cost and token details for a specific model.

input.description: Cost of prompt tokens for this model in USD.

output.description: Cost of completion tokens for this model in USD.

total.description: Total cost for this model in USD.

tokens.description: Token usage for this specific model.

prompt.description: Prompt tokens consumed by this model.

completion.description: Completion tokens generated by this model.

Limits.description: Rate limit and usage information included in every API response.

workflowExecutionRateLimit.description: Current rate limit status for workflow executions.

sync.description: Rate limit bucket for synchronous executions.

async.description: Rate limit bucket for asynchronous executions.

usage.description: Current billing period usage and plan limits.

currentPeriodCost.description: Total spend in the current billing period in USD.

limit.description: Maximum allowed spend for the current billing period in USD.

plan.description: Your current subscription plan (e.g., free, pro, team).

isExceeded.description: Whether the usage limit has been exceeded. Executions may be blocked when true.

RateLimitBucket.description: Rate limit status for a specific execution type.

requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per minute.

maxBurst.description: Maximum number of concurrent requests allowed in a burst.

remaining.description: Number of requests remaining in the current rate limit window.

resetAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rate limit window resets.

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the job.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job started processing.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed. Present only when status is completed or failed.

duration.description: Duration of the job in milliseconds. Present only when status is completed or failed.

output.description: The workflow execution output. Present only when status is completed.

error.description: Error details. Present only when status is failed.

estimatedDuration.description: Estimated duration in milliseconds. Present only when status is queued or processing.

WorkflowExecutionStatus.description: Current status of a workflow execution.

executionId.description: The unique identifier of the execution.

workflowId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

status.description: Current normalized lifecycle status. `paused` is set when a row exists in pausedExecutions with status `paused` or `partially_resumed`; otherwise the workflowExecutionLogs row's status field is used.

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution ended. Null while the run is in flight.

totalDurationMs.description: Total duration of the execution in milliseconds. Null while the run is in flight.

paused.description: Pause-state details. Present only when status is `paused`.

pausedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workflow was paused.

resumeAt.description: Earliest scheduled resume time across active pause points. Null for human-only pauses.

pauseKind.description: What kind of pause the workflow is waiting on.

pausedExecutionId.description: ID of the paused-execution row, useful for cross-referencing with the human-in-the-loop endpoints.

pausePointCount.description: Total number of pause points recorded for this execution.

resumedCount.description: Number of pause points already resumed.

cost.description: Cost summary. Detailed token / model breakdown lives on the /v1/logs detail endpoint.

error.description: Error message. Present only when status is `failed`.

finalOutput.description: The workflow's final output. Returned only when ?includeOutput=true AND status is `completed`.

blockOutputs.description: Per-block outputs keyed by the selector string. Returned only when `?selectedOutputs` is set.

AuditLogEntry.description: An enterprise audit log entry recording an action taken in the workspace.

id.description: Unique identifier for the audit log entry.

workspaceId.description: The workspace where the action occurred.

actorId.description: The user ID of the person who performed the action.

actorName.description: Display name of the person who performed the action.

actorEmail.description: Email address of the person who performed the action.

action.description: The action that was performed (e.g., workflow.created, member.invited).

resourceType.description: The type of resource affected (e.g., workflow, workspace, member).

resourceId.description: The unique identifier of the affected resource.

resourceName.description: Display name of the affected resource.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action occurred.

UsageLimits.description: Current rate limits, usage, and storage information for the authenticated user.

rateLimit.description: Rate limit status for workflow executions.

sync.description: Rate limit bucket for synchronous executions.

isLimited.description: Whether the rate limit has been reached.

async.description: Rate limit bucket for asynchronous executions.

isLimited.description: Whether the rate limit has been reached.

authType.description: The authentication type used (api or manual).

currentPeriodCost.description: Total spend in the current billing period in USD.

limit.description: Maximum allowed spend for the current billing period in USD.

plan.description: Your current subscription plan (e.g., free, pro, team).

uploadedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the file was uploaded.

KnowledgeBase.description: A knowledge base for storing and searching document embeddings.

tokenCount.description: Total token count across all documents.

docCount.description: Number of documents in the knowledge base.

connectorTypes.description: Types of connectors attached to this knowledge base.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the knowledge base was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the knowledge base was last modified.

ChunkingConfig.description: Configuration for how documents are split into chunks for embedding.

KnowledgeDocument.description: A document in a knowledge base.

knowledgeBaseId.description: Knowledge base this document belongs to.

chunkCount.description: Number of chunks created from this document.

enabled.description: Whether the document is enabled for search.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

KnowledgeDocumentDetail.description: Detailed document information including processing and connector details.

knowledgeBaseId.description: Knowledge base this document belongs to.

enabled.description: Whether the document is enabled for search.

connectorId.description: Connector ID if sourced from an external connector.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL for connector-sourced documents.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

SearchResult.description: A single search result from knowledge base vector search.

sourceUrl.description: URL to the original source document for connector-synced documents (e.g., a Confluence page, Google Doc, or Notion page). Null for documents without an external source.

chunkIndex.description: Index of the chunk within the document.

metadata.description: Tag metadata associated with the chunk (display names mapped to values).

similarity.description: Similarity score (0-1, where 1 is most similar).

TagFilter.description: A tag-based filter for knowledge base search.

tagName.description: Display name of the tag to filter by.

fieldType.description: Data type of the tag field.

operator.description: Comparison operator (e.g. eq, neq, gt, lt, gte, lte, contains, between).

PausedExecutionSummary.description: Summary of a paused workflow execution.

id.description: Unique identifier for the paused execution record.

workflowId.description: The workflow this execution belongs to.

status.description: Current status of the paused execution.

totalPauseCount.description: Total number of pause points in this execution.

resumedCount.description: Number of pause points that have been resumed.

updatedAt.description: When the paused execution record was last updated.

expiresAt.description: When the paused execution will expire and be cleaned up.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the paused execution.

triggerIds.description: IDs of triggers that initiated the original execution.

pausePoints.description: List of pause points in the execution.

PausePoint.description: A point in the workflow where execution has been paused awaiting human input.

contextId.description: Unique identifier for this pause context. Used when resuming execution.

blockId.description: The block ID where execution paused.

response.description: Data returned by the block before pausing, including display data and form fields.

registeredAt.description: When this pause point was registered.

resumeStatus.description: Current status of this pause point.

snapshotReady.description: Whether the execution snapshot is ready for resumption.

resumeLinks.description: Links for resuming this pause point.

apiUrl.description: API endpoint URL to POST resume input to.

uiUrl.description: UI URL for a human to review and approve.

contextId.description: The context ID for this pause point.

queuePosition.description: Position in the resume queue, if queued.

latestResumeEntry.description: The most recent resume queue entry for this pause point.

parallelScope.description: Scope information when the pause occurs inside a parallel branch.

parallelId.description: Identifier of the parallel execution group.

branchIndex.description: Index of the branch within the parallel group.

branchTotal.description: Total number of branches in the parallel group.

loopScope.description: Scope information when the pause occurs inside a loop.

ResumeQueueEntry.description: An entry in the resume execution queue.

id.description: Unique identifier for this queue entry.

pausedExecutionId.description: The paused execution this entry belongs to.

parentExecutionId.description: The original execution that was paused.

newExecutionId.description: The new execution ID created for the resume.

contextId.description: The pause context ID being resumed.

status.description: Status of this queue entry (e.g., pending, claimed, completed, failed).

queuedAt.description: When the entry was added to the queue.

claimedAt.description: When execution started processing this entry.

failureReason.description: Reason for failure, if the resume failed.

PausedExecutionDetail.description: Detailed information about a paused execution, including the execution snapshot and resume queue.

queue.description: Resume queue entries for this execution.

PauseContextDetail.description: Detailed information about a specific pause context within a paused execution.

execution.description: Summary of the parent paused execution.

pausePoint.description: The specific pause point for this context.

queue.description: Resume queue entries for this context.

activeResumeEntry.description: The currently active resume entry, if any.

ResumeResult.description: Result of a synchronous resume execution.

success.description: Whether the resume execution completed successfully.

executionId.description: The new execution ID for the resumed workflow.

output.description: Workflow output from the resumed execution.

error.description: Error message if the execution failed.

BadRequest.description: Invalid request parameters. Check the details array for specific validation errors.

error.description: Human-readable error message describing the validation failure.

details.description: List of specific validation errors with field-level details.

Unauthorized.description: Invalid or missing API key. Ensure the X-API-Key header is set with a valid key.

Forbidden.description: Access denied. You do not have permission to access this resource. For audit log endpoints, this requires an Enterprise subscription and organization admin/owner role.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found. Verify the ID is correct and belongs to your workspace.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Wait for the duration specified in the Retry-After header before retrying.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

error.description: Human-readable error message with rate limit details.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

message.description: Confirmation message describing how many rows were updated.

updatedCount.description: Number of rows that were updated.

updatedRowIds.description: Array of IDs for each row that was updated.
